debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x y : α
h✝ : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
h : G.Adj x y
⊢ Matroid.Series (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x y

failed_attempts:
classical
  by_contra hxy
  have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (by
    by_contra hxV
    exact hxy <| (G.matchingMatroid).series_of_eq (by simpa using (matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h
      (by
        by_contra hyV
        exact (h y).elim <| fun M hM ↦ by
          rcases hM with ⟨hmax, hy⟩
          exact hyV <| (V_subset_V _).trans hmax.toIsMatching.subset <| by
            rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
            exact he.1)) ) )
  exact hx ((G.matchingMatroid).coloop_of_not_series hxy)

classical
  by_cases hx : x ∈ V(G)
  · by_cases hy : y ∈ V(G)
    · sorry
    · simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingMatroid, Graph.matchingIndepMatroid, hy] using
        (Matroid.seriesPair_of_not_mem_ground (M := G.matchingMatroid) (e := y) (f := x) hy)
  · simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingMatroid, Graph.matchingIndepMatroid, hx] using
      (Matroid.seriesPair_of_not_mem_ground (M := G.matchingMatroid) (e := x) (f := y) hx)

classical
  simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid] using (G.matchingIndepMatroid.matroid_seriesPair_of_adj h h)

classical
  by_cases hx : x ∈ V(G)
  · by_cases hy : y ∈ V(G)
    ·
      by_contra hxy
      have hxC : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hx
      have hyC : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hy
      exact hxy (G.matchingMatroid.series_of_adj_of_not_isColoop h hxC hyC)
    ·
      have : x = y := by
        have := h.mem_left
        exact (hy (this.2 hx)).elim

    have : x = y := by

    subst this

  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa using (G.matchingMatroid.series_self x)
  have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by

  have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by

  have hx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hxV
  have hy : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hyV
  exact (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj_of_not_coloop h hx hy h hxy)

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.Series] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    refine (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_iff ?_).2 ?_
    · exact hxy

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy

  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by

    have hyy' : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hyV

    ·

        · rcases Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp hz with rfl

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.Series]
  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      exact h.left_mem
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      exact h.right_mem
    have hnx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hxV
    have hny : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hyV
    have hxB : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
    have hM : G.IsMatching M := hMmax.toIsMatching
    have hmax : M.encard = ν(G) := hMmax.encard
    have hyB : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
      by_contra hyB
      have haug : G.IsAugPath hM (.cons x (Classical.choose h.exists_edge) (.nil y)) := by
        classical
        have hl : G.IsLink (Classical.choose h.exists_edge) x y :=
          (Classical.choose_spec h.exists_edge)
        have hx' : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxB
        have hy' : y ∉ V(G, M) := by simpa using hyB
        exact isAugPath_of_singleEdge hl hx' hy' hxy
      have hM' : G.IsMatching (M ∆ E(.cons x (Classical.choose h.exists_edge) (.nil y))) :=
        haug.augment
      have hcd : M.encard < (M ∆ E(.cons x (Classical.choose h.exists_edge) (.nil y))).encard := by
        simpa [haug.augment_encard] using (lt_add_of_pos_right M.encard (by decide : (0:ℕ∞) < 1))
      exact (not_lt_of_ge (hMmax.max _ hM')) hcd
    have hser : G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
      refine (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff.2 ?_)
      refine ⟨hxy, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact hnx
      · intro B hB hxB'
        have hr : y ∈ B := by
          by_contra hyB'
          have : (B ∪ {y}).encard = B.encard + 1 := by
            simpa [Set.encard_union_eq, hyB', Set.disjoint_singleton_right] using
              (Set.encard_insert_of_not_mem hyB')
          have hBy : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (B ∪ {y}) := by
            rcases hB with ⟨M', hM', hsub⟩
            refine ⟨M', hM', ?_⟩
            intro z hz
            rcases hz with hz | hz
            · exact hsub hz
            · simpa using hsub (by simpa using hz)
          have := G.matchingMatroid.indep_not_encard_lt_rank hBy
          simpa [this] using this
        exact hr
    exact hser

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa using (G.matchingMatroid.series_self x)
  ·
    rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
      exact he.1
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
      exact he.2
    have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := hxV
    have hyE : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := hyV
    refine (Matroid.series_iff ?_).2 ?_
    · exact ⟨hxE, hyE, hxy⟩
    · intro I hI hxI
      have : (insert x I) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
        intro v hv
        rcases hv with rfl | hvI
        · exact (by
            have : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
              simpa [Graph.V, hxV] using hxM
            exact this)
        · exact hxI hvI
      have hIM : ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ (insert x I) ⊆ V(G, M') := ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, this⟩
      have hIx : G.matchingIndepMatroid.Indep (insert x I) := hIM
      have : y ∈ Matroid.cl (G.matchingMatroid) (insert x I) := by
        by_contra hycl
        have : G.matchingIndepMatroid.Indep (insert y (insert x I)) := by
          rcases hIx with ⟨M0, hM0, hsub0⟩
          rcases h y with ⟨M1, hM1max, hyM1⟩
          have hM1 : G.IsMatching M1 := hM1max.toIsMatching
          have hyM1' : y ∉ V(G, M1) := hyM1
          have hxM1' : x ∉ V(G, M1) := by
            have : x ∈ V(G, M1) → False := by
              intro hx'
              exact (G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hxV) (by
                simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, Graph.matchingMatroid._match_1] using hx')
            exact this
          rcases isAugPath_of_singleEdge (by simpa [Graph.Adj] using h) hxM1' hyM1' hxy with hP
          refine ⟨M1 ∆ E(.cons x (Classical.choice (by simpa [Graph.Adj] using h)) (.nil y)),
            hP.augment, ?_⟩
          intro v hv
          rcases hv with rfl | hv
          ·
            have : x ∈ V(G, M1 ∆ E(.cons x (Classical.choice (by simpa [Graph.Adj] using h)) (.nil y))) := by
              simpa using (hP.augment_vertex_subset (by
                simp [Graph.V, hxV] at hxM1'))
            exact this
          rcases hv with rfl | hv
          ·
            have : y ∈ V(G, M1 ∆ E(.cons x (Classical.choice (by simpa [Graph.Adj] using h)) (.nil y))) := by
              simpa using (hP.augment_vertex_subset (by
                simp [Graph.V, hyV] at hyM1'))
            exact this
          · exact (hsub0 (by
              have : insert x I ⊆ V(G, M0) := hsub0
              exact this (by
                right
                exact hv)))
        exact hycl (by
          simpa [Matroid.mem_cl_iff_forall_insert_indep] using this)
      exact this

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by

    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by

    have hy : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hyV

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff, Matroid.Parallel] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩

    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
      exact he.mem_right
    have hxnot : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
    have hynot : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
    have hser : G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by

        (G.matchingMatroid.series_of_adj_of_not_isColoop (G := G) h hxnot hynot)

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl y)
  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      have : x ∈ V(G, ({h.edge} : Set β)) := by
        rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
        refine ⟨e, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp
        · simpa [Graph.V, Graph.Inc] using he.inc_left
      exact (Graph.V_subset _ _ this)
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      have : y ∈ V(G, ({h.edge} : Set β)) := by
        rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
        refine ⟨e, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp
        · simpa [Graph.V, Graph.Inc] using he.inc_right
      exact (Graph.V_subset _ _ this)
    have hnx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := by
      exact matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
    have hny : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := by
      exact matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
    refine (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj_of_not_coloop h hnx hny ?_ ?_).1
    · exact h
    · exact h

classical
  simpa [matchingMatroid] using (matchingIndepMatroid := G.matchingIndepMatroid)
    (by
      -- `Series` is a matroid property; unfold `matchingMatroid` and use the corresponding lemma on the
      -- underlying `IndepMatroid`-generated matroid.
      have := (show (G.matchingMatroid).Series x y from by
        -- placeholder to bridge definitional equality
        simp [matchingMatroid])
      exact this)

classical
  by_contra hxy
  have hx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (by simpa using h.left_mem)
  have hy : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (by simpa using h.right_mem)
  have hxy' : ¬ x = y := by
    intro hEq
    subst hEq
    exact hxy (by simpa [Matroid.Series])
  exact hxy (G.matchingMatroid.series_or_coloop_or_eq_of_adj h hx hy hxy')

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_refl]
  ·
    refine (Matroid.series_iff.2 ?_).1
    intro S hS hxS hyS hdisj
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      by_contra hxV
      exact hxS ((G.matchingMatroid.subset_ground hS) (by
        simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, hxV] ))
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      by_contra hyV
      exact hyS ((G.matchingMatroid.subset_ground hS) (by
        simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, hyV] ))
    obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hxnot⟩ := h x
    have hM : G.IsMatching M := hMmax.toIsMatching
    have hMeq : M.encard = ν(G) := by simpa using (IsMaxMatching.encard (G := G) (M := M) hMmax)
    have hyM : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
      by_contra hym
      have haug : G.IsAugPath hM (.cons x (Classical.choose h.exists_isLink) (.nil y)) := by
        obtain ⟨e, hl⟩ := h.exists_isLink
        exact isAugPath_of_singleEdge (G := G) (M := M) (hM := hM) hl hxnot hym hxy
      have := haug.augment_encard (hM := hM)
      have hle : (M ∆ E(.cons x (Classical.choose h.exists_isLink) (.nil y))).encard ≤ M.encard := by
        have hmax : G.IsMaxMatching M := hMmax
        exact hmax.max _ (haug.augment (hM := hM))
      have : M.encard + 1 ≤ M.encard := by
        simpa [this] using hle
      exact (Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this)
    have hxhy : ({x, y} : Set α) ⊆ V(G, M ∪ {Classical.choose h.exists_isLink}) := by
      intro v hv
      rcases hv with rfl | rfl
      · exact Or.inr (by
          have := (Classical.choose_spec h.exists_isLink).inc_left
          simpa [V, Graph.V, Set.mem_iUnion] using this)
      · exact Or.inl (by simpa using hyM)
    have hind : (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) := by
      refine ⟨M ∪ {Classical.choose h.exists_isLink}, ?_, ?_⟩
      ·
        refine ?_
        sorry
      ·
        intro v hv
        rcases (Set.mem_union.mp hv) with hvS | hvxy
        · exact (G.matchingMatroid.subset_ground hS) (hS hvS)
        ·
          have : v = x ∨ v = y := by
            simpa [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hvxy
          rcases this with rfl | rfl
          · exact (hxhy (by simp))
          · exact (hxhy (by simp))
    exact hind

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.Series] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    rcases (h y) with ⟨M, hMmax, hyM⟩
    have hM : G.IsMatching M := hMmax.toIsMatching
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := h.left_mem
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := h.right_mem
    have hxM : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
      by_contra hxM'
      have : (M ∪ {e | ∃ u v, u = x ∧ v = y ∧ G.IsLink e u v}) ⊆ E(G) := by
        intro e he
        rcases he with he | he
        · exact hM.subset he
        · rcases he with ⟨u, v, rfl, rfl, hl⟩
          exact hl.right_mem
      have hIs : G.IsMatching (M ∪ {e | ∃ u v, u = x ∧ v = y ∧ G.IsLink e u v}) := by
        refine ⟨this, ?_⟩
        intro e f he hf hef
        rcases he with heM | hexy
        · rcases hf with hfM | hfxy
          · exact hM.disjoint heM hfM hef
          · rcases hfxy with ⟨u, v, rfl, rfl, hl⟩
            have : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM'
            exact (hM.disjoint heM (by
              have : (∃ u v, u = x ∧ v = y ∧ G.IsLink f u v) := by
                exact ⟨x, y, rfl, rfl, hl⟩
              exact Or.inr this) (by
                intro hEq; exact hef (by simpa using hEq))).mono_left ?_
        · rcases hexy with ⟨u, v, rfl, rfl, hl⟩
          rcases hf with hfM | hfxy
          ·
            have : y ∉ V(G, M) := hyM
            exact (hM.disjoint (by
              have : (∃ u v, u = x ∧ v = y ∧ G.IsLink e u v) := by
                exact ⟨x, y, rfl, rfl, hl⟩
              exact Or.inr this) hfM (by
                intro hEq; exact hef (by simpa using hEq))).mono_left ?_
          ·
            rcases hfxy with ⟨u', v', rfl, rfl, hl'⟩
            exfalso
            exact hef (by
              have : e = f := by
                have := hl.uniq hl'
                simpa using this
              simpa [this])
      have hcard : (M.encard : ℕ∞) < (M ∪ {e | ∃ u v, u = x ∧ v = y ∧ G.IsLink e u v}).encard := by
        have : (∃ e, G.IsLink e x y) := h.exists_isLink
        rcases this with ⟨e, hl⟩
        have he : e ∈ {e | ∃ u v, u = x ∧ v = y ∧ G.IsLink e u v} := by
          exact ⟨x, y, rfl, rfl, hl⟩
        have hnot : e ∉ M := by
          intro heM
          have : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
            exact ⟨e, heM, y, by simpa using hl.inc_right⟩
          exact hyM this
        simpa [encard_union_eq (by
          refine disjoint_left.2 ?_
          intro e heM he'
          rcases he' with ⟨u, v, rfl, rfl, hl'⟩
          exact hnot heM)] using (encard_lt_encard_insert (s := M) hnot)
      exact (lt_irrefl _ <| (hMmax.max _ hIs).trans_lt hcard).elim
    have hyM' : y ∉ V(G, M) := hyM
    have hxhy : x ≠ y := hxy
    have hcl : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl ({x} : Set α) := by
      -- in this matroid, adjacency forces dependence of {x,y}
      have : ¬ (∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ ({x, y} : Set α) ⊆ V(G, M')) := by
        intro hI
        rcases hI with ⟨M', hM', hsub⟩
        have hxM' : x ∈ V(G, M') := hsub (by simp)
        have hyM' : y ∈ V(G, M') := hsub (by simp)
        rcases hxM' with ⟨ex, hex, vx, hvx⟩
        rcases hyM' with ⟨ey, hey, vy, hvy⟩
        by_cases hE : ex = ey
        · subst hE
          have : x = y := by
            have hx' : x ∈ V(G, ex) := by simpa using hvx
            have hy' : y ∈ V(G, ex) := by simpa using hvy
            exact (by
              have := by
                simpa [Graph.V] using And.intro hx' hy'
              exact this)
          exact hxhy this
        · exact (hM'.disjoint hex hey hE).le_bot ⟨by simpa using hvx, by simpa using hvy⟩
      have hx : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := hxV
      have hy : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := hyV
      have hd : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.Indep ({x, y} : Set α) := by
        intro hI
        rcases hI with ⟨M', hM', hsub⟩
        exact this ⟨M', hM', hsub⟩
      have hcl' : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl ({x} : Set α) := by
        simpa [Matroid.mem_closure_iff, hx, hy, Set.subset_singleton_iff, hd, hxhy] using
          (G.matchingMatroid.mem_closure_pair_of_not_indep (x := x) (y := y) hd)
      exact hcl'
    exact G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_iff.2 ⟨hxy, hcl, by
      have hxcl : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl ({y} : Set α) := by
        simpa [Set.pair_comm] using hcl
      exact hxcl⟩

classical
  rcases h x with ⟨Mx, hMx, hxMx⟩
  rcases h y with ⟨My, hMy, hyMy⟩
  have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
    simpa [Graph.Adj] using h.left_mem
  have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
    simpa [Graph.Adj] using h.right_mem
  have hxcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
  have hycol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
  have hxpar : G.matchingMatroid.Parallel x y := by
    simpa [Matroid.parallel_iff, Matroid.series_iff_parallel_dual] using
      (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj (G := Gᵈ) (x := x) (y := y) (by
        intro v
        rcases h v with ⟨M, hM, hvM⟩
        refine ⟨M, ?_, hvM⟩
        exact hM) (by simpa using h))
  simpa [Matroid.series_iff, hxcol, hycol] using hxpar

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff] using (G.matchingMatroid.loop_or_coloop_or_series x)
  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      by_contra hxV
      have hxcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (by
        simpa using hxV)
      exact hxcol (G.matchingMatroid.isColoop_of_not_mem_ground hxV)
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      by_contra hyV
      have hycol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (by
        simpa using hyV)
      exact hycol (G.matchingMatroid.isColoop_of_not_mem_ground hyV)
    have hxcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
    have hycol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
    have hxy' : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E ∧ y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
      simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, Graph.matchingIndepMatroid, hxV, hyV]
    exact (G.matchingMatroid.series_of_adj_of_not_coloop h h hxcol hycol hxy'.1 hxy'.2 h)

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_self]
  ·
    have hx : x ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
      exact he.1
    have hy : y ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
      exact he.2
    rcases (h x) with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
    have hM : G.IsMatching M := hMmax.toIsMatching
    have hMe : e ∉ M := by
      intro heM
      have hx' : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
        exact ⟨e, heM, (G.inc_left_mem_of_mem_edge (hM.subset heM) (by simpa using h)).1⟩
      exact hxM hx'
    have hMy : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
      by_contra hyM
      have : G.IsAugPath hM (.cons x e (.nil y)) :=
        isAugPath_of_singleEdge (by simpa using h) hxM hyM hxy
      have hmatch : G.IsMatching (M ∆ E (.cons x e (.nil y))) := this.augment
      have henc : (M ∆ E (.cons x e (.nil y))).encard = M.encard + 1 := this.augment_encard
      have hle : (M ∆ E (.cons x e (.nil y))).encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max _ hmatch
      have : M.encard + 1 ≤ M.encard := by simpa [henc] using hle
      exact Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this
    have hyM : y ∈ V(G, M) := hMy
    have hMx : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
    have hxnotcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hx
    have hynotcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hy
    have : G.matchingMatroid.Cocircuit {x, y} := by
      refine (G.matchingMatroid.cocircuit_iff_eq_compl_hyperplane).2 ?_
      refine ⟨V(G) \ {x, y}, by ext z; simp [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff,
        and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm], ?_⟩
      refine (G.matchingMatroid.hyperplane_iff).2 ?_
      refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      ·
        have : (V(G) \ {x, y}) ⊆ V(G) := by
          intro z hz
          exact hz.1
        exact this
      ·
        have : (V(G) \ {x, y}) ≠ V(G) := by
          intro hEq
          have : x ∈ V(G) \ {x, y} := by simpa [hEq] using hx
          exact this.2 (by simp)
        exact this
      ·
        intro z hz
        have hzV : z ∈ V(G) := hz.1
        have hznxy : z ≠ x ∧ z ≠ y := by
          have : z ∉ ({x, y} : Set α) := hz.2
          simpa [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] using this
        have hznotcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop z := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hzV
        have : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.Hyperplane (V(G) \ {x, y} ∪ {z}) := by
          intro hHp
          have : z ∈ V(G) \ {x, y} := by
            refine ⟨hzV, ?_⟩
            intro hzxy
            rcases hzxy with rfl | hzY
            · exact hznxy.1 rfl
            · cases hzY with
              | inl hzX => exact hznxy.1 hzX
              | inr hzY' => exact hznxy.2 hzY'
          have : V(G) \ {x, y} ∪ {z} = V(G) \ {x, y} := by
            ext w
            by_cases hwz : w = z
            · subst hwz; simp [this]
            · simp [Set.mem_union, Set.mem_singleton_iff, hwz]
          exact (by simpa [this] using hHp)
        exact this
    exact this.seriesPair

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.Series] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
    have hM : G.IsMatching M := hMmax.toIsMatching
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := h.left_mem
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := h.right_mem
    have hyM : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
      by_contra hy
      have : G.IsAugPath hM (.cons x (Classical.choice h) (.nil y)) := by
        have hl : G.IsLink (Classical.choice h) x y := Classical.choose_spec h
        exact isAugPath_of_singleEdge (u := x) (v := y) hl hxM hy hxy
      have hM' : G.IsMatching (M ∆ E (.cons x (Classical.choice h) (.nil y))) := this.augment
      have hcd : M.encard < (M ∆ E (.cons x (Classical.choice h) (.nil y))).encard := by
        simpa [this.augment_encard] using (lt_add_of_pos_right _ (Nat.succ_pos 0))
      exact (hMmax.max _ hM').not_lt hcd
    exact by
      simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using
        (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h h)

classical
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  rcases h y with ⟨M', hM'max, hyM'⟩
  have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
    rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
    exact he.1
  have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
    rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
    exact he.2
  have hnx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := by
    exact matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
  have hny : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := by
    exact matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
  have hxB : (V(G, M) : Set α) ⊆ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
    intro v hv
    exact (Graph.V_sub (G := G) (M := M) hv)
  have hyB : (V(G, M') : Set α) ⊆ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
    intro v hv
    exact (Graph.V_sub (G := G) (M := M') hv)
  have hbasx : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
    have hI : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (V(G, M)) := by
      refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
      intro v hv
      simpa using hv
    refine (G.matchingMatroid.isBase_iff_forall_insert_dep ?_).2 ?_
    · exact hI
    intro z hz
    by_contra hdep
    have hzE : z ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
      simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid] using hz
    have hzV : z ∈ V(G) := by
      simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hzE
    have hziness : G.inessential z := h z
    rcases hziness with ⟨Mz, hMzmax, hzMz⟩
    have : False := by
      have hmaxz := hMzmax.encard
      have hmaxx := hMmax.encard
      have hsub : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, Mz) := by
        intro v hv
        by_contra hv'
        have : G.inessential v := ⟨M, hMmax, hv'⟩
        have : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop v := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (Graph.V_sub (G := G) (M := M) hv)
        exact this (by
          have hb : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M)) := by
            exact (by
              have hI : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (V(G, M)) := by
                refine ⟨M, hMmax.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
                intro w hw
                simpa using hw
              exact (G.matchingMatroid.exists_isBase_superset_of_indep hI hxB).choose_spec.1)
          exact hb.isColoop_of_mem (by simpa using hv))
      have hcard : (V(G, M)).encard = (V(G, Mz)).encard := by
        have := congrArg (fun n ↦ (2 : ℕ∞) * n) (by simpa [hmaxx, hmaxz] : M.encard = Mz.encard)
        simpa [Graph.V_encard_eq_two_mul_encard_of_isMatching (hMmax.toIsMatching),
          Graph.V_encard_eq_two_mul_encard_of_isMatching (hMzmax.toIsMatching), mul_assoc] using this
      have hle : (V(G, M)).encard ≤ (V(G, Mz)).encard := by
        exact encard_le_encard hsub
      exact (ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne hle (by
        intro hEq
        have : z ∈ V(G, Mz) := by
          have : z ∈ V(G, M) := by
            have : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (insert z (V(G, M))) := by
              simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hdep
            rcases this with ⟨M'', hM'', hzsub⟩
            have : z ∈ V(G, M'') := hzsub (by simp)
            exact this
          have : z ∈ V(G, Mz) := hsub this
          exact this
        exact this
        ) )).elim
    exact (this.elim)
    exact False.elim this
  have hbasy : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M')) := by
    have hI : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (V(G, M')) := by
      refine ⟨M', hM'max.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
      intro v hv
      simpa using hv
    refine (G.matchingMatroid.isBase_iff_forall_insert_dep ?_).2 ?_
    · exact hI
    intro z hz
    by_contra hdep
    have hzE : z ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by
      simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid] using hz
    have hzV : z ∈ V(G) := by
      simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hzE
    have hziness : G.inessential z := h z
    rcases hziness with ⟨Mz, hMzmax, hzMz⟩
    have : False := by
      have hmaxz := hMzmax.encard
      have hmaxy := hM'max.encard
      have hsub : V(G, M') ⊆ V(G, Mz) := by
        intro v hv
        by_contra hv'
        have : G.inessential v := ⟨M', hM'max, hv'⟩
        have : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop v := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (Graph.V_sub (G := G) (M := M') hv)
        exact this (by
          have hb : G.matchingMatroid.IsBase (V(G, M')) := by
            exact (by
              have hI : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (V(G, M')) := by
                refine ⟨M', hM'max.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
                intro w hw
                simpa using hw
              exact (G.matchingMatroid.exists_isBase_superset_of_indep hI hyB).choose_spec.1)
          exact hb.isColoop_of_mem (by simpa using hv))
      have hcard : (V(G, M')).encard = (V(G, Mz)).encard := by
        have := congrArg (fun n ↦ (2 : ℕ∞) * n) (by simpa [hmaxy, hmaxz] : M'.encard = Mz.encard)
        simpa [Graph.V_encard_eq_two_mul_encard_of_isMatching (hM'max.toIsMatching),
          Graph.V_encard_eq_two_mul_encard_of_isMatching (hMzmax.toIsMatching), mul_assoc] using this
      have hle : (V(G, M')).encard ≤ (V(G, Mz)).encard := by
        exact encard_le_encard hsub
      exact (ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne hle (by
        intro hEq
        have : z ∈ V(G, Mz) := by
          have : z ∈ V(G, M') := by
            have : G.matchingMatroid.Indep (insert z (V(G, M'))) := by
              simpa [Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hdep
            rcases this with ⟨M'', hM'', hzsub⟩
            have : z ∈ V(G, M'') := hzsub (by simp)
            exact this
          have : z ∈ V(G, Mz) := hsub this
          exact this
        exact this
        ) )).elim
    exact (this.elim)
    exact False.elim this
  have hxmem : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
  have hymem : y ∉ V(G, M') := hyM'
  have : G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
    classical
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff_forall_isCircuit, Graph.matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using
      (G.matchingMatroid.series_of_not_coloop_of_adj hnx hny h)
  exact this

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    have hx : x ∈ V(G) := by
      simpa [Graph.Adj, hxy] using h.mem_left
    have hy : y ∈ V(G) := by
      simpa [Graph.Adj, Ne.symm hxy] using h.mem_right
    have hnx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hx
    have hny : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hy
    exact
      (G.matchingMatroid.parallel_iff_series.mp <|
        (G.matchingMatroid.parallelPair_of_adj (G := G) h hxy)).series_of_not_isColoop hnx hny

classical
  by_cases hx : x ∈ V(G)
  · by_cases hy : y ∈ V(G)
    ·
      have hxC : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hx
      have hyC : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hy
      simpa [Matroid.series_iff_parallel_dual] using (h.parallelPair_of_adj_dual (G := G) h hx hy hxC hyC)
    ·
      have : y ∉ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hy
      exact (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_iff.2 (Or.inr this))
  ·
    have : x ∉ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hx
    exact (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_iff.2 (Or.inl this))

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
      exact he.mem_left
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
      exact he.mem_right
    have hx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
    have hy : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
    exact (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff_forall_isColoop_or_eq (x := x) (y := y)).2
      (fun z hz => by
        rcases hz with rfl | rfl
        · exact Or.inl hx
        · exact Or.inl hy)

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
    have hM : G.IsMatching M := hMmax.toIsMatching
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := h.left_mem
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := h.right_mem
    have hxVM : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
    have hyVM : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
      by_contra hy'
      have haug :
          G.IsAugPath hM (.cons x (G.chooseEdge h) (.nil y)) := by
        refine isAugPath_of_singleEdge ?_ hxVM hy' hxy
        exact G.isLink_chooseEdge h
      have hmatch := haug.augment
      have henc := haug.augment_encard
      have hle := hMmax.max (M ∆ E(.cons x (G.chooseEdge h) (.nil y))) hmatch
      have : M.encard + 1 ≤ M.encard := by simpa [henc] using hle
      exact (Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this)
    have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid]
    have hyE : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid]
    refine (Matroid.series_iff ?_).2 ?_
    · exact hxE
    ·
      refine ⟨hyE, ?_⟩
      intro I hI hxI hyI hInd
      rcases hInd with ⟨M', hM', hIsub⟩
      have hxI' : x ∈ V(G, M') := hIsub hxI
      have hyI' : y ∈ V(G, M') := hIsub hyI
      have : False := by
        have hsub : V(G) ⊆ V(G, M') := by
          intro v hv
          by_cases hvx : v = x
          · subst hvx; exact hxI'
          by_cases hvy : v = y
          · subst hvy; exact hyI'
          exact (hM'.subset (by
            rcases hv with ⟨e, he⟩
            exact he)).elim
        have hmax' : G.IsMaxMatching M' := hM'.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hsub
        have := hmax'.encard
        have := (hMmax.encard).trans this.symm
        exact (hxVM (by
          have : V(G, M) = V(G, M') := by
            ext v; constructor <;> intro hv <;> exact (by
              have := congrArg (fun n => n) rfl
              exact hv)
          simpa [this] using hxI')).elim
      exact this.elim

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_self_iff]
  ·
    rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
    have hM : G.IsMatching M := hMmax.toIsMatching
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      have := h.left_mem
      simpa using this
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      have := h.right_mem
      simpa using this
    have hyM : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
      by_contra hyM'
      have : G.IsMatching (insert (G.edgeOfAdj h) M) := by
        refine ?_
        -- use `hM` and add edge `edgeOfAdj h`, contradict maximality since both endpoints unmatched
        have hlu : G.IsLink (G.edgeOfAdj h) x y := by
          simpa [Graph.edgeOfAdj] using G.isLink_edgeOfAdj h
        have haug : G.IsAugPath hM (.cons x (G.edgeOfAdj h) (.nil y)) :=
          isAugPath_of_singleEdge hlu hxM hyM' hxy
        simpa [symmDiff_singleton, insert_eq_of_mem] using haug.augment
      have hcd : (insert (G.edgeOfAdj h) M).encard ≤ M.encard := hMmax.max _ this
      have hmem : G.edgeOfAdj h ∉ M := by
        intro hem
        have hx' : x ∈ V(G, M) := ⟨G.edgeOfAdj h, hem, x, by simpa [V, hlu]⟩
        exact hxM hx'
      have : M.encard < (insert (G.edgeOfAdj h) M).encard := by
        simpa [Set.encard_insert_of_not_mem hmem, Nat.lt_succ_iff] using Nat.lt_succ_self _
      exact (not_lt_of_ge hcd) this
    have hxnotcoloop : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
    have hynotcoloop : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
    refine (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff ?_).2 ?_
    · exact hxy
    · refine ⟨hxnotcoloop, hynotcoloop, ?_⟩
      intro B hB hxB
      have hxB' : x ∈ B := hxB
      have hBmax : B ⊆ V(G) := by
        exact (G.matchingMatroid.subset_ground hB)
      have hyB : y ∈ B := by
        by_contra hyB
        -- swap x with y using matching M avoiding x; since y is matched in M, y is essential in basis
        have : (B \ {x}) ∪ {y} ⊆ V(G, M) := by
          intro v hv
          rcases hv with hv | hv
          · have : v ∈ B := by
              have : v ∈ B \ {x} := hv
              exact this.1
            exact False.elim (hxM <| by
              have : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
                exact ⟨_, (by
                  -- derive x matched in M if x ∈ B and y ∉ B, contradiction with independence exchange
                  sorry), _, by trivial⟩
              exact this)
          · simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hyM
        -- contradiction with basis maximality
        have hInd : G.matchingIndepMatroid.Indep ((B \ {x}) ∪ {y}) := by
          refine ⟨M, hM, ?_⟩
          exact this
        exact hyB (G.matchingMatroid.mem_of_basis_of_indep hB hInd (by simp [hxB']))
      exact hyB

classical
  by_cases hx : x ∈ V(G)
  · by_cases hy : y ∈ V(G)
    · have hxC : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hx
      have hyC : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hy
      simpa [Matroid.series_iff] using (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj_of_not_isColoop h hxC hyC h)
    · have : y ∉ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hy
      exact (G.matchingMatroid.series_of_not_mem_right this)
  · have : x ∉ G.matchingMatroid.E := by simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid] using hx
    exact (G.matchingMatroid.series_of_not_mem_left this)

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    rcases (h x) with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      have : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
        rcases h with ⟨e, he⟩
        exact (G.inc_left_mem_vertices he).trans (by
          refine ?_)
      exact (G.mem_vertices_of_mem_vertices_edgeSet this)
    have hnc : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x :=
      matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) (h := h) hxV
    exact (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj_of_not_isColoop hnc h)

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff_parallel, Matroid.parallel_self] using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
      by_contra hxV
      exact hxy (by
        have : x = y := by
          simpa [Graph.Adj] using h
        exact this)
    have hyV : y ∈ V(G) := by
      by_contra hyV
      have : x = y := by
        simpa [Graph.Adj] using h
      exact hxy this
    have hxcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hxV
    have hycol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h hyV
    simpa [Matroid.series_iff, hxcol, hycol] using (G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h h)

classical
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · subst hxy
    simpa using (G.matchingMatroid.series_refl x)
  ·
    refine (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff_forall_isCircuit_of_mem.2 ?_)
    intro C hC hxC hyC
    have hxcol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (by
      simpa using (G.Adj.mem_left h))
    have hycol : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop (G := G) h (by
      simpa using (G.Adj.mem_right h))
    have hxcl : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl (C \ {x}) := by
      have : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl (C \ {x} ∪ {y}) := by
        simpa [Set.diff_union_self, Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm,
          Set.union_singleton] using (G.matchingMatroid.closure_pair_of_adj h)
      simpa [Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm, Set.diff_union_self] using
        (G.matchingMatroid.cl_mono (by
          intro z hz
          exact Or.inl hz) this)
    have hycl : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl (C \ {y}) := by
      have : y ∈ G.matchingMatroid.cl (C \ {y} ∪ {x}) := by
        simpa [Set.diff_union_self, Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm,
          Set.union_singleton] using (G.matchingMatroid.closure_pair_of_adj (by simpa [G.adj_comm] using h))
      simpa [Set.union_assoc, Set.union_left_comm, Set.union_comm, Set.diff_union_self] using
        (G.matchingMatroid.cl_mono (by
          intro z hz
          exact Or.inl hz) this)
    exact hC.eq_of_mem_of_mem_cl_diff_singleton hxC hxcl hyC hycl hxy
simpa [matchingMatroid] using (G.matchingIndepMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h h)
